  • DeltaRank

DeltaRank¶

Given a vectorial Booleand function in univariate form, returns its delta rank:

 1function deltaRank(f)
 2   R:=Parent(f);
 3   F:=BaseRing(R); n:=Degree(F);
 4   Gt<[E]>:=FreeAbelianGroup(2*n);
 5   G<[E]>:=AbelianGroup(quo<Gt|{2*e=0 : e in E}>);
 6   A1 := GroupAlgebra(  ComplexField(), G : Rep:="Vector"); A := GroupAlgebra( GF(2), G : Rep:="Vector");
 7
 8function rr1(v)
 9   return &+[E[i]*(Integers()!v[i]): i in [1..n]];
10end function;
11
12function rr2(v)
13   return &+[E[i+n]*(Integers()!v[i]): i in [1..n]];
14end function;
15FF:=ANF(f);
16Gf:=[rr1(v)+rr2([Evaluate(FF[i],[v[j]:j in [1..n]]) : i in [1..n]]) : v in VectorSpace(GF(2),n)];
17
18Gf:=&+[A1!g : g in Gf];
19Df:= Gf*Gf - elt< A1 | 2^n, 0 >;
20Df:=2^(-1)*Df;
21
22DDf:=[];
23V:=VectorSpace(GF(2),2*n);
24for v in V do
25   j:=(&+[Integers()!v[i]*E[i]:i in [1..2*n]]);
26   if Coefficient(Df,j) eq 1 then Append(~DDf,G!(&+[Integers()!v[i]*E[i]:i in [1..2*n]])); end if;
27end for;
28DDf:=&+[A!g : g in DDf];
29J:=ideal<A|DDf>;
30
31DeltaRank:=Dimension(J);
32   return DeltaRank;
33end function;
